title: Composition over inheritance deterministic draft bank

publication.changeSummary: Misconception MCQ, canonical fill-gap, and runnable core task for Composition over inheritance; every item remains blocked from formal exams pending independent human review.

items.title: Composition over inheritance: reject the misconception
items.prompt: Which statement is source-aligned for Java: Beginner to Intermediate and corrects this misconception? Composition means copying another class's methods into a wrapper and exposing all of them unchanged.

examEligibility.rationale: AI-assisted draft item; independent human source, technical, pedagogy, accessibility, and answer-oracle review is required before formal-exam eligibility.

hints: Compare each option with both the language-specific boundary case and the cited operational model.

feedback.correct: Correct. Compose a collaborator behind a purpose-built contract and delegate only behavior that preserves the owning object's invariants.
feedback.incorrect: That choice preserves the misconception. Compose a collaborator behind a purpose-built contract and delegate only behavior that preserves the owning object's invariants.

criteria.description: Selects the source-aligned correction and rejects the documented misconception.

privateAuthorNotes: A human reviewer must verify source fidelity and ensure the distractor remains plausible without teaching it as fact.

options.text: Compose a collaborator behind a purpose-built contract and delegate only behavior that preserves the owning object's invariants.
Composition means copying another class's methods into a wrapper and exposing all of them unchanged.

answer.explanation: Compose a collaborator behind a purpose-built contract and delegate only behavior that preserves the owning object's invariants.

items.title: Composition over inheritance: canonical checkpoint

feedback.correct: Correct. The checkpoint is 'purpose-built contract'. Compose a collaborator behind a purpose-built contract and delegate only behavior that preserves the owning object's invariants.
feedback.incorrect: The phrase must preserve the exact language rule. Compose a collaborator behind a purpose-built contract and delegate only behavior that preserves the owning object's invariants.

criteria.description: Supplies the exact canonical checkpoint phrase that completes the source-aligned correction.

privateAuthorNotes: Human reviewer must verify the accepted phrase and whether additional spelling variants are technically equivalent.

items.title: Composition over inheritance: runnable core task
items.prompt: Read whitespace-separated integers. Push them into a Stack that owns an ArrayDeque, then print values in LIFO order.

examEligibility.rationale: AI-assisted draft item; independent human source, technical, pedagogy, accessibility, and answer-oracle review is required before formal-exam eligibility.

hints: Start from the stated input/output contract, implement the smallest language-specific operation, and run the visible boundary before changing structure.

feedback.correct: The visible and hidden Java: Beginner to Intermediate runner checks match the declared contract.
feedback.incorrect: At least one deterministic runner check differs; inspect input parsing, boundary behavior, and exact output before retrying.

criteria.description: Compiles or parses and passes every visible and hidden deterministic runner check for the declared contract.

privateAuthorNotes: Reference solution and both tests are AI-assisted draft material. Execute in the pinned runner and obtain independent human review before any exam use.

answer.explanation: The purpose-built Stack exposes only LIFO behavior and delegates storage without inheriting unrelated deque operations.
